claims.description: The full root-cause chain and learner-only fixes are recorded across matcher ordering, unsupported literal-like targets, visible repeated clarification, platform announcement, and compact-layout boundaries.

The final test-only RED proves literal-looking pedagogical and question input, bogus subject-list routing, ColdStartCard dispatch, and identical repeated clarification all fail against reviewed production while the explicit literal catalog jump remains characterized.
The immutable final production-only REVERT reproduces the named matcher and screen failures with every repaired test unchanged.
The exact final RESTORE returns all repaired matcher, main-bar, ColdStartCard, visible-repeat, adversarial, iOS, and Android cases to green.
The original immutable RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, and RESTORE proof remains preserved and is extended with honestly labeled rework-cycle proof.
The implementation plan records real final TypeScript symbols and control flow plus executable matcher, screen, compact-layout, platform, type, lint, build, format, and lifecycle-validation commands.
